# Agent-Reach 修改登记表

## 当前状态

| item | value |
| --- | --- |
| upstream source copied into repo | `false` |
| upstream source modified | `false` |
| patches applied | `0` |
| local fork created | `false` |
| package installed | `false` |
| production config changed | `false` |

## 策略

如果后续阶段修改 Agent-Reach 或携带 patch，每项变更必须登记以下内容：

- upstream file.
- local patch path.
- reason.
- risk.
- rollback.
- review owner.
- validator.

P0 记录为无修改。
